title: Campaign Monitor vs Benchmark Email (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Benchmark Email: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Benchmark Email: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Benchmark Email comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Benchmark Email targets small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting An Easy-To-Use Email Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Benchmark Email?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Benchmark Email is stronger for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Benchmark Email to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
